name: NXP Semiconductors N.V.
description: NXP Semiconductors N.V. is a prominent Dutch semiconductor design and manufacturing company headquartered in Eindhoven, Netherlands. With over 60 years of combined expertise, the company provides high-performance mixed-signal and standard product solutions that are used in a wide range of applications, including automotive, industrial, mobile, and smart home technologies. NXP is recognized as a global leader in secure connectivity solutions for embedded applications, leveraging its extensive portfolio to drive innovation in the Internet of Things and automotive sectors while maintaining a significant presence in international markets and on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
